GeoFibroMax Volume 2

GeoMx Batch 2 dataset

Dataset Overview
13 samples total 
11 from IDS (Interval Debulking Surgery) 
2 from PDS (Primary Debulking Surgery) 
11 patients 
Includes 2 paired samples (pre- and post-treatment) 
194 AOIs (tumor & stromal regions)
